title: {YTP} ~ RadicalFaith360 Reviews the Doduo
description:
Now that hurts 'cause I live in America.

I've wanted to do a poop of RadicalFaith473 for a long time, and I finally got around to it. I probably won't in the future, but I figured I owed it to the best YTP re-enacter out there. So, RadicalFaith289: This is for you.

Source: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N-GpTqHTWJU
